texto: Without pushing an agenda (okay, maybe I've pushed a bit), I've spread a little veganism wherever I've gone. I've become friends with chefs at the meatiest restaurants you can imagine, and shown them a few things that opened their minds (and their menus) to vegan options. It's easy to be convincing when the food is delicious. It doesn't feel like a sacrifice--it feels like a step up.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tal Ronnen: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amizade. O trecho “Without pushing an agenda (okay, maybe I've pushed a bit), I've spread a little veganism wherever…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, food, vegan pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e vegan.
